description: Standard bug-fix flow: reproduce, find root cause, patch, test, review. Sequential chain because every step strictly depends on the previous one.
definitionOfDone: Reproducer is on disk, root cause is documented, patch lands with green tests, and a reviewer approves the fix for "${context}".

steps.summary: Identify the root cause for ${context} (one-paragraph diagnosis)
Run the regression test for ${context} and capture receipts
